action.reasoning: Observation: New best test AUC 0.7563 (val peak 0.7582@ep11) with embedded DKT (h=896/e=128/d=0.4); steady loss drop to ~0.493, ES worked well, iter time ~45s leaves ~15min budget (~3 more iters). Analysis: Capacity+reg balance improving but can push further with larger hidden/embed, lower LR, slightly stronger WD+dropout to reduce post-peak overfitting and raise val peak for better test gen; train.py workspace view truncated (incomplete save dict) risks predict.py breakage. Decision: Fully rewrite clean complete train.py (fix all, save ALL hparams+state, robust ES/scheduler w/o deprecated args, per-epoch jsonl ONLY, minimal stdout); set h=1024/l=2/e=192/d=0.5/lr=2e-4/wd=5e-5/epochs=60/sch-pat=5/es-pat=15. Keep model.py/predict.py. Run training then submit_eval on best_model.pt.
